metadata.algorithm: manual weighted OLS with one-sided Epanechnikov kernel
metadata.note: Regression lock on the weighted kernel + weighted OLS formula implemented in diff_diff.local_linear.local_linear_fit. Not a third-party validation of weighted-CCF methodology; see REGISTRY 'Weighted extension (Phase 4.5)' for the parity-gap acknowledgement.

dgp2.description: Informative weights (exp decay from boundary), G=400

dgp3.description: Small G=200, nonlinear m(d), bounded heterogeneous weights
